methodology.scope: Latest period only for each segment
methodology.anchor_definition: Anchor is the best balanced candidate by latest-period CVR and conversion volume, not highest CVR alone.
methodology.region_mapping: Uses explicit iOS and Android country lists provided for Poor, Mid, Dev, and Rich.
methodology.ppp_status: Not applied yet in this step.

cross_regional_anchor.ppp_status: PPP adjustment not applied yet. This first step uses observed latest-period performance only.

why: Backed by 339 users in the latest-period read
anchor_validation.definition: Anchor = best balanced candidate using latest-period-only CVR plus conversion volume, with a minimum user floor of 25 when possible.
